title: Kawa`s Pedestals
description: A small Pedestal mod aimed to be fairly compatible with weaponmods because my friend kawataro asked me to make one.
body:
A small Pedestal mod aimed to be fairly compatible with weaponmods because my friend kawataro asked me to make one.

This mod adds a small Pedestal and a wall hanger were swords and various other weapons can be displayed.
It is datadriven so compat for other mods can be added via datapacks as well.

If you want to add compat via a datapack check the wiki, if you still have further questions feel free to create an issue on Github.
You can also ust ask me on [discord](https://discord.gg/TebNhbCAUP)

 

Supports MedievalWeapons
